label: 第1話
source_locator: 単行本1巻 目次 p.5
summary_short: 伏黒恵は杉沢第三高校に保管されていた特級呪物を捜索する。祖父を亡くした虎杖悠仁は、呪霊に襲われた先輩と伏黒を救うため宿儺の指を飲み込み、両面宿儺を受肉させる。
summary_full: 仙台の杉沢第三高校では、伏黒恵が保管されていた特級呪物を捜していた。並外れた身体能力を持つ虎杖悠仁はオカルト研究会に所属しつつ、入院中の祖父を見舞っている。祖父は人を助け、最期は人に囲まれて死ねと言い残して亡くなる。伏黒から呪物の危険性を聞いた虎杖は、先輩の佐々木と井口が封印を解こうとしている学校へ戻る。指に引き寄せられた呪霊が二人を襲い、伏黒も負傷する中、虎杖は呪力を得るため指を飲み込む。両面宿儺が受肉して呪霊を破壊するが、虎杖はすぐに肉体の主導権を取り戻す。最悪の事態を警戒する伏黒は、虎杖を呪いとして祓うと告げる。

candidate_evidence.summary_short_legacy: 伏黒恵 investigates Sugisawa Municipal High School for a powerful 呪物. The high school's Occult Research club faces closing due to 虎杖悠仁's relationship with other clubs. After school, 悠仁 visits his grandfather at the hospital one last time. 恵 confronts 悠仁 at the hospital and explains that a special grade curse is threatening his school and the club members. The duo returns to the school and fight together to save the other students from demonic curses. 恵 and 悠仁 are taken by surprise by a more powerful spirit, and the former is injured. Impassioned by his grandfather's words, 悠仁 remains determined to help people. He devours the 呪物 attracting the curses in an effort to gain 呪力. 恵 is certain 悠仁 will die, but instead, the 呪物 incarnates within his body and transforms 悠仁.
candidate_evidence.summary_full_legacy: During the night, 伏黒恵 , a student of 東京 呪術高専, is sent to 仙台市 to look for a special grade 呪物. He ends up in a shed but doesn't find anything there so he calls his teacher. Unfortunately for 恵, the man over the phone just laughs at his misfortune and tells him not to return home until he's retrieved the 呪物 before hanging up. 虎杖悠仁 , 佐々木せつこ , and 井口たけし hang out in their assigned space for the Occult Research club at Sugisawa Municipal High School. They use an Ouija board to make fun of the student council president, who barges in moments after. He threatens to close down the club and re-assign the space to the girl's track team. The Occult Research club makes fun of the Student Council President. 悠仁 jokingly threatens to curse the president and points out the paranormal activity surrounding the rugby field. Rugby players have been getting sick and they believe its connected to an employee that went missing during the construction of the field. However, their senpai informs them that ticks were the cause of the sudden illnesses. The student council president is tired of the Occult Research club spreading rumors. Also, the club doesn't reach the three-member minimum because 悠仁 is actually apart of the track and field team surprising the trio. The track and field coach interrupts and reveals that he re-wrote 悠仁's club application. A curse lurks over Sugisawa High. The coach wants to make use of 悠仁's extraordinary abilities for the track team. 悠仁 refuses, so the coach challenges him to a game that will put his membership on the line. Meanwhile, out on the track field, 恵 investigates the rugby field. He appears as just another student, but he can sense the grade 2 curse in the area. A giant-tick like 呪霊 is posted on top of the scoring poles, seemingly out of 恵's view. The boy wonders if this has anything to do with the 呪物 said to be at this school. Out on the field, the coach challenges 悠仁 to a game of shot put and loses after the student hurls the heavy ball thirty meters with ease. 悠仁's grandfather asks him to help people. Sasaki and Iguchi tell 悠仁 that he doesn't need to feel loyal to the Occult Research club. However, 悠仁 says that he's grown to like the club and knows they can't keep it without him. 恵 watches from afar before moving on, but ends up running into 悠仁 on the latter's way to the hospital. 悠仁 dashes away with inhuman speed, and 恵 is surprised to find that he can sense even more curse energy than before. 悠仁 visits his grandfather at 杉沢病院 where he refuses to learn anything about his parents. With his final words, 悠仁's grandfather tells him to help people and create a life that will end with people surrounding him. After saying goodbye to his beloved guardian, 悠仁 is confronted by 恵 in the lobby. Curses attracted by a 呪物 at the school attack Sasaki and Iguchi. 恵 reveals he is a first-year at 呪術高専 School and asks about a potential 呪物. He explains that a talisman that was used to seal a curse has worn off, signaling potential danger. 悠仁 hands over the small box 恵 is asking for, but its contents are missing. Meanwhile, Sasaki and Iguchi unravel the true 呪物, a finger belonging to a powerful curse. The finger attracts curses to the two students and 悠仁 returns to the school with 恵. He can feel the 呪力 and 恵 tells him to stay back. 恵 heads inside and fends off spirits summoning his 玉犬 by using the 十種影法術 術式 . 悠仁 and 恵 fend off the curses invading the school. He appears to reach Sasaki and Iguchi but it's too late, as they are overtaken by curses. Suddenly, 悠仁 bursts in through the window. Despite 悠仁's fears, he wants to help everyone have a peaceful death like his grandfather, not a gruesome one at the hands of the 呪霊. 悠仁 manages to save Sasaki, but suddenly the curse from earlier crashes through the roof and attacks 恵. He's injured and his 式神 disappear as a result. 恵 is tossed outside, helpless and unable to defend himself. 悠仁 attacks the curse with his bare hands to help in spite of 恵's orders to run away. A curse can only be exercised by another curse, and therefore 悠仁's physical attacks are useless. To save his friends, 悠仁 consumes the 呪物. In order to gain the power of 呪力, 悠仁 devours the cursed finger that his assailant is targeting. 恵 believes 悠仁 will die instantly, but there is a one in a million chance that the 呪物 will incarnate. 悠仁 transforms and instantly obliterates the curse before him. 恵 considers this one in a million chance as the worst-case scenario and realizes that 両面宿儺 has been reincarnated. 宿儺 wishes nothing more than to massacre all humans. However, 悠仁's consciousness fights back to regain control of his body. 恵 notices the struggle but isn't willing to take any chances. He declares that he will exorcise the curse known as 虎杖悠仁 immediately.
candidate_evidence.characters_raw_text: 伏黒恵 五条悟 (声・表紙のみ) 虎杖悠仁 釘崎野薔薇 (表紙のみ) 宿儺 佐々木せつこ 井口たけし Takagi 虎杖倭助
candidate_evidence.locations_raw_text: 杉沢第三高校／杉沢病院
candidate_evidence.battles_events_raw_text: 虎杖悠仁 & 伏黒恵 vs. 呪霊
candidate_evidence.techniques_raw_text: 伏黒恵の術式 十種影法術 術式 玉犬 呪力 呪物 宿儺の指 呪霊 式神 宿儺の指

key_events_verified_phase1: 伏黒が杉沢第三高校で宿儺の指を捜す
虎杖の祖父が遺言を残して亡くなる
佐々木と井口が指の封印を解く
虎杖が指を飲み両面宿儺を受肉させる
虎杖が肉体の主導権を取り戻す
verification_notes: 話名・巻・開始ページは集英社公式。内容は原作漫画のみを扱う章別資料と旧候補を比較し、独自の日本語要約として再構成。原作ページを直接開いた最終照合は後工程。
